runbooks.label: Generic incident
runbooks.description: Evidence-first diagnosis when the monitoring system or product is not yet known.

runbooks.label: Icinga alert
runbooks.description: Diagnose an Icinga-generated host or service alert.

runbooks.label: Nagios alert
runbooks.description: Diagnose a Nagios or Naemon-generated host or service alert.

runbooks.label: Icinga onboarding
runbooks.description: Prepare and verify a plan for adding a host or service to Icinga.

runbooks.label: Nagios onboarding
runbooks.description: Prepare and verify a plan for adding a host or service to Nagios or Naemon.

runbooks.label: Middleware incident
runbooks.description: Diagnose middleware processes, listeners, dependencies, and recent failures.

runbooks.label: Normal account provisioning
runbooks.description: Create and verify one normal non-privileged login account through the reviewed typed mutation path.

runbooks.label: General operations task
runbooks.description: Bounded work that does not fit a more specific runbook.
